scene_input.scene_summary: The young men of Salamah steal and destroy ʿAmr's idol.
characters_present: ʿAmr ibn al-Jamūḥ (in the background, unaware)

schema_output.scene_title: The Brave Young Men of Salamah
schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 111
schema_output.moral_lesson: Bravery and faith can lead to great deeds

characters.name: Young men of Salamah
characters.appearance: youthful, athletic build, dark clothing with white head coverings, seen from behind, moving with excitement

characters.name: ʿAmr ibn al-Jamūḥ
characters.appearance: medium build, dressed in dark clothing with a hood, seen from behind, unaware of the action

characters.name: a villager
characters.appearance: slender build, dressed in dark clothing, seen from behind, watching the scene unfold

schema_output.narrative_text: The young men of Salamah decided to take a brave step and destroy ʿAmr's idol. Under the cover of night, they snuck into ʿAmr's village and smashed the idol to pieces.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A dark and moonlit 7th century Arabian Desert village at night, with a few thatched-roof houses made of mud and palm fronds. In the center of the scene, a group of young men in dark clothing with white head coverings are seen from behind, moving with excitement and energy, as they smash and destroy a large, intricately decorated idol. The idol lies on a wooden platform, and the young men are using wooden clubs and stones to break it. In the background, a figure in dark clothing with a hood is seen from behind, unaware of the action, and a few villagers are watching the scene unfold from a distance. Soft blue and gray moonlight casts a mystical and eerie glow over the scene. Medium close shot at eye level. Dark, muted palette with accents of white and a hint of blue, reflecting the night sky. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
_safety_changes: 'young men' -> 'group of young men' (no change), 'young men in dark clothing with white head coverings are seen from behind' -> 'young men in dark clothing with white head coverings are moving with excitement and energy, as they smash and destroy a large, intricately decorated idol, seen from behind' (no change), 'figure in dark clothing with a hood is seen from behind' -> 'figure in dark clothing with a hood is seen from behind, unaware of the action' (no change), 'a few villagers are watching the scene unfold from a distance' -> 'a few villagers are watching the scene unfold from a distance' (no change)
